$handle..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('uid').val() === auth.uid)

$gid..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('secureChat/groups/' + $gid + '/ownerUid').val() === auth.uid)

$code..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + newData.child('groupId').val() + '/ownerUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + data.child('groupId').val() + '/ownerUid').val() === auth.uid))

$nid..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || (!data.exists() && newData.child('targetUid').val() === $uid && newData.child('fromUid').val() === auth.uid && ((newData.child('type').val() === 'mention' && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + newData.child('groupId').val() + '/members/' + auth.uid).exists() && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + newData.child('groupId').val() + '/members/' + $uid).exists()) || (newData.child('type').val() === 'invite' && ((root.child('secureChat/groups/' + newData.child('groupId').val() + '/privacy').val() === 'public' && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + newData.child('groupId').val() + '/members/' + auth.uid).exists()) || (root.child('secureChat/groups/' + newData.child('groupId').val() + '/privacy').val() === 'private' && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + newData.child('groupId').val() + '/ownerUid').val() === auth.uid))))))
$nid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['type','targetUid','groupId','groupName','fromUid','fromHandle','fromName','read','status','createdAt','createdAtClient']) && newData.child('targetUid').val() === $uid && (newData.child('type').val() === 'mention' || newData.child('type').val() === 'invite') && newData.child('groupId').isString() && newData.child('groupName').isString() && newData.child('groupName').val().matches(/^.{1,60}$/) && newData.child('fromUid').isString() && newData.child('fromHandle').isString() && newData.child('fromHandle').val().matches(/^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_.-]{1,22}[a-z0-9]$/) && newData.child('fromName').isString() && newData.child('fromName').val().matches(/^.{1,40}$/) && newData.child('read').isBoolean() && newData.child('status').isString() && newData.child('status').val().matches(/^(new|pending|accepted|declined|dismissed)$/) && newData.child('createdAtClient').isNumber() && (newData.child('type').val() === 'invite' || (newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().matches(/^.{1,180}$/))) && (!newData.child('inviteCode').exists() || newData.child('inviteCode').val().matches(/^[A-Z0-9]{10,16}$/)))

$gid..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('members').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() === 'owner') || (data.exists() && data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid))

$uid..write: auth != null && (root.child('secureChat/groups/' + $gid + '/ownerUid').val() === auth.uid || (auth.uid === $uid && !newData.exists() && data.exists()) || (auth.uid === $uid && data.exists() && newData.exists() && newData.child('role').val() === data.child('role').val()) || (auth.uid === $uid && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + $gid + '/privacy').val() === 'public') || (auth.uid === $uid && newData.child('inviteCode').isString() && root.child('secureChat/invites/' + newData.child('inviteCode').val() + '/groupId').val() === $gid))

$mid..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + $gid + '/members/' + auth.uid).exists() && newData.child('senderUid').val() === auth.uid) || (!newData.exists() && root.child('secureChat/groups/' + $gid + '/ownerUid').val() === auth.uid))

$commentId..write: auth != null && root.child('posts/' + $postId + '/published').val() === true && !data.exists() && newData.hasChildren(['uid','name','text','createdAt']) && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid
